reasoning: The Lean statement asserts exactly the same claim as the informal one. `Matrix.GeneralLinearGroup (Fin 2) (ZMod 2)` is Mathlib's `(Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 2))ˣ`, the group of invertible 2×2 matrices; since `ZMod 2` is a field, invertibility is equivalent to `det ≠ 0`, matching the informal definition of $T$. `Equiv.Perm (Fin 3)` is the standard encoding of $S_3$. `Nonempty (_ ≃* _)` expresses group isomorphism. Hence the Lean signature faithfully captures "$T \cong S_3$".
